# Pull Request

## Summary
Provide a concise description of the changes introduced in this PR.

## Motivation
Explain why this change is necessary or beneficial.

## Changes
List the major changes included in this PR.
- Item 1
- Item 2
- Item 3

## Testing
Describe how you tested the changes.
Include PowerShell versions, OS versions, and any relevant logs.

## Documentation
- [ ] README updated (if applicable)
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated (under `[Unreleased]`)
- [ ] docs/ updated (Design, Logging, etc.)

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project style and conventions
- [ ] No breaking changes introduced without justification
- [ ] Logging and exit-code behavior remain deterministic
- [ ] All new logic is covered by tests or manual validation
- [ ] No sensitive information is exposed in logs
